heading: Fees for compliance reviews of liquefied natural gas facilities
label: 60303 Fees for compliance reviews of liquefied natural gas facilities

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: The Secretary of Transportation (referred to in this section as the “Secretary”) shall impose on a person who files with the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission an application for a liquefied natural gas facility that has design and construction costs totaling not less than $2,500,000,000 a fee for the necessary expenses of a review, if any, that the Secretary conducts, in connection with that application, to determine compliance with subpart B of part 193 of title 49, Code of Federal Regulations (or successor regulations).

children.heading: .—Relation to other review
children.label: 2 .—Relation to other review
children.text: The Secretary may not impose fees under paragraph (1) and section 60117() or 60301(b) for the same compliance review described in paragraph (1).o

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe procedures to collect fees under this section.

children.label: A
children.text: use a department, agency, or instrumentality of the Federal Government or of a State or local government to collect fees under this section; and

children.label: B
children.text: reimburse that department, agency, or instrumentality a reasonable amount for the services provided.

children.heading: .—Account
children.label: c .—Account
children.text: There is established an account, to be known as the “Liquefied Natural Gas Siting Account”, in the Pipeline Safety Fund established in the Treasury of the United States under section 60301.
